title: salix × sendtneri
intro: Salix × sendtneri, also known as Sendtner's willow or hybrid willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae) and is a cross between Salix purpurea and Salix viminalis. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Salix × sendtneri include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Salix × sendtneri can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
